sign-in-or-create-account: Sign in or create your account to join the conversation!
external-media-enable-prompt: . Do you want to enable external media?
external-media-privacy-warning: External media may allow websites to collect information about you and your device. No information is sent or requested until you press the "play" button.
info-not-shared: This information is not shared with other users.
embed-post-instructions: Embed this post in your website. Simply copy the following snippet and paste it into the HTML code of your website.
dont-have-access-to-email: Don't have access to <0>{{currentAccountEmail}}</0> ? <1>Change your email address</1> .
receive-email-to-verify: You'll receive an email at <0>{{currentAccountEmail}}</0>  to verify it's you.
default-interaction-settings: You can set default interaction settings in <0>Settings → Moderation → Interaction settings.</0>
customize-interaction-post: Customize who can interact with this post.
reply-settings-author-choice: Reply settings are chosen by the author of the thread
muted-words-description: Posts can be muted based on their text, their tags, or both. We recommend avoiding common words that appear in many posts, since it can result in no posts being shown.
load-muted-words-error: We're sorry, but we weren't able to load your muted words at this time. Please try again.
no-muted-words-message: You haven't muted any words or tags yet
